text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Oguri. Don'tcha think it's
about time ya folded?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I absolutely will not give in…!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What part aren'tcha understandin'? When you just grill the whole thing plain, it's called sugatayaki!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hah! See? You can't argue with my perfect
squid logic, so eat your words!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. All this talk of eating and squid
made my stomach grumble…

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Eh… fine, whatever. Let's drop this for now.
Wanna go to the cafeteria?
